creator: ports@geeksrus.net
text:
I upgraded from a bento-built mutt-devel-1.3.24_1 to a locally built 1.3.24_2
(for the security fix), and now:

[alane ~]$ mutt
Error in /home/alane/.muttrc, line 21: imap_user: unknown variable
Error in /home/alane/.muttrc, line 22: imap_home_namespace: unknown variable
source: errors in /home/alane/.muttrc
Press any key to continue...

How-To-Repeat: 
See above.
